scripts.build: npm run sync:shared && tsc && node view/build.js
scripts.deploy: npm run sync:shared && tsc && node view/build.js && mkdir -p $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-social/view && cp dist/*.js manifest.json $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-social/ && if [ -d dist/_shared ]; then mkdir -p $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-social/_shared && cp -R dist/_shared/* $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-social/_shared/; fi && cp view/index.js $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-social/view/ && if [ -d $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/.next/standalone/plugins/plugin-social ]; then cp dist/*.js manifest.json $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/.next/standalone/plugins/plugin-social/ && if [ -d dist/_shared ]; then mkdir -p $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/.next/standalone/plugins/plugin-social/_shared && cp -R dist/_shared/* $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/.next/standalone/plugins/plugin-social/_shared/; fi && mkdir -p $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/.next/standalone/plugins/plugin-social/view && cp view/index.js $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/.next/standalone/plugins/plugin-social/view/; fi && (curl -fsS -X POST "${THEARCHIVER_URL:-http://localhost:3000}/api/plugins/reload" -o /dev/null && echo '[deploy] Plugin host reloaded' || echo '[deploy] Warn: could not reach host at ${THEARCHIVER_URL:-http://localhost:3000} — restart TheArchiver manually to pick up manifest changes')
scripts.package: npm run sync:shared && tsc && node view/build.js && rm -rf dist/package && mkdir -p dist/package/view && cp dist/*.js manifest.json dist/package/ && if [ -d dist/_shared ]; then cp -R dist/_shared dist/package/; fi && cp view/index.js dist/package/view/ && cd dist/package && zip -r ../plugin-social.zip .
